scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('./dist')) fs.rmSync('./dist', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('./dist')"
scripts.build:vue: npm run clean && FRONTEND=vue vite build && npm run build:be && npm run copy
scripts.build:vanilla: npm run clean && FRONTEND=vanilla vite build && npm run build:be && npm run copy
scripts.build:one-time: npm run clean && ENTRY_TYPE=one-time node esbuild.js && npm run copy
scripts.build:be-only: npm run clean && npm run build:be && npm run copy
scripts.copy: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('./appsscript.json')) fs.copyFileSync('./appsscript.json', './dist/appsscript.json'); if(fs.existsSync('./src/backend/static')) fs.cpSync('./src/backend/static', './dist', {recursive: true})"
scripts.deploy:vue: npm run build:vue && npm run push
scripts.deploy:vanilla: npm run build:vanilla && npm run push
scripts.deploy:one-time: npm run build:one-time && npm run push
scripts.deploy:be-only: npm run build:be-only && npm run push
